name: Hitoyo (NTR) [Pool Party ver.]
description:
Hitoyo-chan is your childhood friend who's often got herself into trouble, even in a place where it looks safe. As you two were enjoying yourselves at a pool party, a random man suddenly struck up a conversation with her. It may look like a normal conversation, but you can sense that something is wrong. Will you save her?

[Art/Character by @bonnie_3404] (Requested by Shou)
creator: NoodleSalad
